description.ko: 이끼 같은 섬유질과 액체 생명체처럼 흐르는 황금빛의 복잡한 그물을 통해 자연의 근본적인 호흡을 시각화합니다.
description.en: A visualization of the fundamental breath of nature, showcasing a complex web of mossy fibers and golden light flowing like liquid life.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Mitochondrial Bioluminescent Web.' A sprawling network of #7FB069 emerald moss-like fibers and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular structures pulsing with rhythmic life. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid void, exhaling swirling ribbons of #FFE66D golden liquid light. Macro focus on semi-permeable cellular membranes and glowing internal sap channels. Rendered in Octane, 8k resolution, featuring complex fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine, breathing organic flow.
